title: rubus × debilis
intro: Rubus × debilis, also known as Himalayan raspberry or Tibetan raspberry, is a hybrid of the Rubus genus that is native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × debilis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as a natural anti-diarrheal agent. Rubus × debilis is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
